title: Add Meshtastic app-compat protobuf exchange vectors
description: Why this exists: compatibility implementation needs source-backed golden vectors for current app flows before Zephyr or adapter code is written. What needs to be done: create vectors for BLE raw protobuf exchanges covering heartbeat, want_config_id 69420 config stage, want_config_id 69421 node DB stage, TEXT_MESSAGE_APP send, incoming TEXT_MESSAGE_APP, ROUTING_APP ACK/NAK with decoded.request_id, and oversized/unknown message handling. Acceptance criteria: vectors are generated from or validated against current Meshtastic protobuf schemas; Android/iOS/Python expectations are represented; tests consume the vectors or a follow-up implementation Bead is linked.
